case_title: ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION VS. FRONTGATE MARKETING INC

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT FRONTGATE MARKETING, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER AND CONSENT JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS). calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Frontgate Marketing, Inc.
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Frontgate Marketing, Inc.

Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Frontgate Marketing, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
